unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 狐狸躲在 box (盒子) 里。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 长颈鹿的脖子像图表 (graph) 一样直线向上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 元音组合法: ea 发长元音 /i:/，老鹰高高飞翔。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A baby wolf and its mother!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 狼 (wolf) 在高尔夫 (golf) 球场上奔跑。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根联想法: pen (钢笔)，企鹅像穿着燕尾服拿着钢笔的绅士。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 照顾；护理 v. 关心；在乎
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 相对开音节 (VCe) / r控制音节
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: explore the meaning of caring for animals.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 懂得分享 (share) 也就是懂得关心 (care)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wolves take good care of their babies.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: take (拿) + care (关心) + of -> 拿出关心去照顾。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have a fish sandwich
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词记忆: sand (沙) + wich (巫婆) -> 传说中发明三明治的伯爵就在玩沙子的地方吃肉夹面包。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Why don't you like snakes?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母象形法: S 就像一条弯曲爬行的蛇。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because they're really scary.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根联想法: scar (伤疤) -> 满身伤疤的人看起来很吓人 (scary)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They have long necks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 脖子 (neck) 被掐住了，“耐克” (neck)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Guess! It lives in the sea.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 我们来猜测 (guess) 一下今天的客人 (guest) 是谁。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Is it the shark?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 在黑暗 (dark) 的深海里潜伏着鲨鱼 (shark)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: giraffe snake mouse whale penguin bear
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 鲸 (whale) 发出了“喂哦”的巨大叫声。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Elephants look very different from other animals. They are huge.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拼写规律法: h + uge，字母u在VCE结构中发/ju:/本音，表示极为巨大。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: because they're dangerous / scary/...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: danger (危险) + ous (形容词后缀, 充满...) -> 充满危险的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Let's save the forests and not buy things made of ivory.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形变记忆法: 把人 save (拯救) 出来，他们就 safe (安全) 了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They are also a symbol of good luck here.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 看到那只小鸭子 (duck) 会带来好运 (luck)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 泰国的；泰国人的 n. 泰国人；泰语
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: On 13 March, we celebrate Thai Elephant Day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 发音同 tie (领带)，泰国 (Thai) 人打领带。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They have large ears and long trunks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 大象的鼻子 (trunk) 力量大得能拉动卡车 (truck)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They can pick up and carry heavy things with their trunks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想法: 用手 pick (捡)，用脚 kick (踢)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They can pick up and carry heavy things with their trunks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向联想法: pick (捡) + up (向上) -> 把东西从地上拿起来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They can pick up and carry heavy things with their trunks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 图像联想法: 用小汽车 (car) 帮忙搬运 (carry) 东西。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They are very playful and love to play in the water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: play (玩) + ful (充满的) -> 充满玩心的、爱嬉戏的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They are great swimmers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: swim (游泳) + 双写m + er (人) -> 游泳的人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: they can remember one another and places with food
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: 一个人 (one) 和另一个人 (another) -> 互相。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They look after other elephants when they don't feel well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 画面感法: look (看) + after (在...之后) -> 跟在后面看着 -> 照顾。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Elephants are an important part of Thai life and culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀关联: 带有 -ture 后缀，和 nature (自然) 相对，是人类创造的文明文化 (culture)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: However, they are in danger.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: how (如何) + ever (总是) -> 无论如何 -> 然而。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: However, they are in danger.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 愤怒 (anger) 往往会带来危险 (danger)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: However, they are in danger.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定搭配: in (在...里) + danger (危险)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They live in forests, but people cut down too many trees.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 森林 (forest) 是动物们为了 (for) 休息 (rest) 的地方。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: people cut down too many trees.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想: cut (切) 使得树木倒下 (down)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: people cut down too many trees.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 语法点: too many 后接可数名词复数 (如 trees)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People also kill elephants for their ivory.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 让人生病 (ill) 最终可能会致死 (kill)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Let's save the forests and not buy things made of ivory.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 语法搭配: be made of 看得出原材料的制成。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People also kill elephants for their ivory.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 哎我日 (i-vo-ry)，偷猎者居然拔大象牙。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She is quite a friendly dog
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: friend (朋友) + ly (形容词后缀) -> 像朋友一样的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She is quite a friendly dog, but she is not scary at all!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似字区分: quite (相当)，把 e 放到外面是“相当”出格，把 e 关在里面是 quiet (安静)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She is quite a friendly dog
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语搭配: quite a + 名词或形容词修饰的单数名词。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: but she is not scary at all!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 强调句型: 否定词后加 at all 强调“绝对没有”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She has beautiful fur.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 天冷了，发 (fur) 我一件毛皮大衣。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You see, I am blind.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 眼睛瞎了 (blind) 就找 (find) 不到路了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She can see and has great hearing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: hear (听) 加 -ing 变成名词听觉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It says they're from Antarctica.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根联想: Ant (反) + arctic (北极的) -> 与北极相对的地方就是南极。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They're from Africa.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 爱非力卡 -> 爱上非洲这个神奇的地方。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hi, I'm Malee and I live in Thailand!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译专有名词。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hi, I'm Malee and I live in Thailand!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: Thai (泰国的) + land (土地) -> 泰国。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They are also a symbol of good luck here.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定表达: symbol 表示标记、象征。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Elephants look very different from other animals.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定搭配: be different from (不同于)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Elephants are an important part of Thai life and culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语结合: 整体中的一份 (part)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helps me find my way around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作短语: 找到 (find) 我的路 (way) 绕着走 (around) -> 不迷路。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This helps them to think about and do more than one thing at once.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 语境记忆: once 表示一次，at once 表示在同一次做 -> 同时/马上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Octopuses can also fit into small places because they do not have any bones!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 空间感: fit (合适) + into (进入里面) -> 大小正好塞得进。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This helps the octopuses to get away fast.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动向记忆: 走开 (get away) 以免被抓。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What's more, when an octopus loses an arm, it can grow it back!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 句式连接词: 用来进一步补充更棒或更重要的事情。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: it can grow it back!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作解析: 生长 (grow) 回到原来的状态 (back)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: why it is important to protect it!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: pro (向前/提前) + tect (掩盖) -> 提前掩护 -> 保护。
